descriptionHtml:
Hallberg Rassy 36 for sale 1999 | 2 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

 

The Hallberg Rassy 36 for sale 1999 is a highly respected Swedish cruiser, known for its solid build quality, comfortable interior, and reliable performance at sea (Autopilot, Compass, Radar, Plotter, Bow Thruster, Battery Charger, Hot Water,Tender, Liferaft...). This particular example is offered in good condition, reflecting the care of attentive ownership and regular maintenance. With classic proportions and thoughtful details throughout, she is ready for new adventures.

Specifications – Hallberg Rassy 36 for sale 1999

  • Length: 11.41 m
  • Beam: 3.55 m
  • Draft: 1.70 m
  • Hull Material: Wood
  • Keel Material: Lead
  • Keel Shape: Fin

Deck Equipment & Comfort

  • Sprayhood: Yes (new in 2023)
  • Bimini: Yes (new in 2023)
  • Cockpit Table: 2 (one removable)
  • External Shower: Yes

Cabins & Interior

  • Double Cabins: 2
  • Dinette Berth: 1
  • Bathroom: 1
  • Galley Stove: Yes
  • Oven: Yes
  • Refrigerator: Yes

Engine & Mechanical

  • Engine: Volvo Penta MD22
  • Power: 50 hp
  • Engine Year: 1999
  • Engine Hours: 1,500
  • Fuel Tank: 345 L
  • Transmission: Shaft drive
  • Propeller: 3 fixed blades
  • Steering: Wheel
  • Bow Thruster: Yes (with new battery, 2024)
  • Starter Motor: Recently replaced
  • Annual Engine Servicing: Yes

Navigation & Electronics

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF: Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Tridata: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Stereo: Yes
  • Chart Plotter: Yes
  • Radar: Yes
  • Wind Instrument: Yes (needs calibration)
  • Raymarine Instrumentation: Yes
  • Epirb: Battery replacement needed

Electrical & Water Systems

  • Voltage: 12/220 V
  • Batteries: 3 (total 342 Ah)
  • Water Tank: 1 (310 L, stainless steel)
  • Bilge Pumps: 2 (automatic and manual)
  • Battery Charger: Yes
  • Boiler (hot water): Yes
  • Pressurised Water System: Yes
  • Black Water System: Yes

Rigging & Sails

  • Mast: Selden
  • Bowsprit: Yes
  • Spinnaker Pole: Yes
  • Winches: 3 (Lewmar)
  • Furling Mainsail (Selden): Yes
  • Furling Headsail (Furlex 2000): Yes
  • Sails: New mainsail and headsail (2022), plus storm sail and small headsail

Additional Equipment

  • Tender: Yes
  • Outboard: Yes
  • Anchor: CQR 15 kg
  • Chain: 60 m
  • Mooring Lines: Yes
  • Liferaft: Yes (expires 2029)
  • Fenders: 8

All essential maintenance has been attended to, and key mechanical items such as the starter motor and bow thruster battery are recently renewed.

The Hallberg Rassy 36 for sale 1999 combines timeless design with modern equipment and practical amenities for comfortable voyaging. With updated sails, recent sprayhood and bimini, and a host of navigational equipment, she is well prepared for her next owner. Viewing available, don't hesitate to contact us!
